caption.ru: Проверяйте tag, prerelease flag, signatures and package version.
caption.en: Verify tag, prerelease flag, signatures and package version.

text.ru: Current patch SemVer comes from package.json/generated reference. Content JSON must not hardcode the current 3.3.x patch.
text.en: Current patch SemVer comes from package.json/generated reference. Content JSON must not hardcode the current 3.3.x patch.

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  P[package.json] --> G[generate-reference]
  N[RELEASE_NOTES] --> G
  R[docs/ROADMAP.md] --> V[roadmap parity]
  G --> C[consistency checks]
  V --> C
  C -->|drift| F[Build fails]
  C -->|clean| D[Pages/release evidence]

flowchart TD
  S[Source version] --> D[Destination evidence]
  D --> B[Verified backup]
  B --> M[Supported migration]
  M --> I[Integrity/schema]
  I --> X[Installed smoke]
  X -->|pass| O[Open traffic]
  X -->|fail| R[Restore-only rollback]
